mapper.select: select a.ghjf_id as ghjfId, a.SPUUID as spuuid, a.DJXH as djxh, a.SHXYDM as shxydm, a.NSRMC as nsrmc, a.NSRJC as nsrjc, a.dept_id as deptId, a.GHJGXZJB as ghjgxzjb, a.CLGHBJ as clghbj, a.HYGHBZ as hyghbz, a.SDGHJG_DM as sdghjgDm, a.SDGHJGXZJB as sdghjgxzjb, a.ZGSWJ_DM as zgswjDm, a.ZGSWSKFJ_DM as zgswskfjDm, a.SSGLY_DM as ssglyDm, a.GHLB_DM as ghlbDm, a.XTLB_DM as xtlbDm, a.ZZJGLX_DM as zzjglxDm, a.HY_DM as hyDm, a.DJZCLX_DM as djzclxDm, a.DWLSGX_DM as dwlsgxDm, a.SBLB_DM as sblbDm, a.NSSBRQ as nssbrq, a.PZXH as pzxh, a.PZMXXH as pzmxxh, a.SKSSQQ as skssqq, a.SKSSQZ as skssqz, a.ZSSWJG_DM as zsswjgDm, a.SKSSSWJG_DM as skssswjgDm, a.SKGK_DM as skgkDm, a.DZSPHM as dzsphm, a.PZZL_DM as pzzlDm, a.PZZG_DM as pzzgDm, a.PZHM as pzhm, a.KPY_DM as kpyDm, a.KPY_XM as kpyXm, a.ZSPM_DM as zspmDm, a.ZSZM_DM as zszmDm, a.YSKM_DM as yskmDm, a.GZZE as gzze, a.SL as sl, a.YNSE as ynse, a.JMSE as jmse, a.YJSE as yjse, a.YBTSE as ybtse, a.JKFS_DM as jkfsDm, a.JFHB as jfhb, a.JFZH as jfzh, a.JFHM as jfhm, a.JFHH as jfhh, a.JFYH as jfyh, a.RKRQ as rkrq, a.JSBJ as jsbj, a.JSRQ as jsrq, a.JSCZY as jsczy, a.JCGHZH as jcghzh, a.JCGHHM as jcghhm, a.JCGHHH as jcghhh, a.JCGHBL as jcghbl, a.JCGHJE as jcghje, a.CBJZH as cbjzh, a.CBJHM as cbjhm, a.CBJHH as cbjhh, a.CBJBL as cbjbl, a.CBJJE as cbjje, a.HYGHZH as hyghzh, a.HYGHHM as hyghhm, a.HYGHHH as hyghhh, a.HYGHBL as hyghbl, a.HYGHJE as hyghje, a.XJGHZH as xjghzh, a.XJGHHM as xjghhm, a.XJGHHH as xjghhh, a.XJGHBL as xjghbl, a.XJGHJE as xjghje, a.SJGHZH as sjghzh, a.SJGHHM as sjghhm, a.SJGHHH as sjghhh, a.SJGHBL as sjghbl, a.SJGHJE as sjghje, a.SZGHZH as szghzh, a.SZGHHM as szghhm, a.SZGHHH as szghhh, a.SZGHBL as szghbl, a.SZGHJE as szghje, a.QGGHZH as qgghzh, a.QGGHHM as qgghhm, a.QGGHHH as qgghhh, a.QGGHBL as qgghbl, a.QGGHJE as qgghje, a.JCJZH as jcjzh, a.JCJHM as jcjhm, a.JCJHH as jcjhh, a.JCJBL as jcjbl, a.JCJJE as jcjje, a.JCWSH as jcwsh, a.SDSZH as sdszh, a.SDSHM as sdshm, a.SDSHH as sdshh, a.SDSBL as sdsbl, a.SDSJE as sdsje, a.SWJGZH as swjgzh, a.SWJGHM as swjghm, a.SWJGHH as swjghh, a.SWJGBL as swjgbl, a.SWJGJE as swjgje, a.CBJQFZT as cbjqfzt, a.CBJQFRQ as cbjqfrq, a.CBJQFJG as cbjqfjg, a.CBJJSBFJCZT as cbjjsbfjczt, a.CBJJSBFJCRQ as cbjjsbfjcrq, a.JYM as jym, a.HKPCH as hkpch, a.QFPCH as qfpch, a.BZ as bz, a.BLUUID as bluuid, a.SDGHZH as sdghzh, a.SDGHHM as sdghhm, a.SDGHHH as sdghhh, a.SDGHBL as sdghbl, a.SDGHJE as sdghje, a.CREATE_BY as createBy, a.CREATE_TIME as createTime, a.UPDATE_BY as updateBy, a.UPDATE_TIME as updateTime, b.ghjf_id as sub_ghjfId, b.SPUUID as sub_spuuid, b.TSJFBJ as sub_tsjfbj, b.TSJFSM as sub_tsjfsm, b.CLSJ as sub_clsj, b.TSJFWJ as sub_tsjfwj, b.TSJFTP as sub_tsjftp, b.CREATE_BY as sub_createBy, b.CREATE_TIME as sub_createTime, b.UPDATE_BY as sub_updateBy, b.UPDATE_TIME as sub_updateTime from gh_jf_cbjqf a left join gh_jf_cbjtsjf b on b.ghjf_id = a.ghjf_id where a.ghjf_id = #{id}
